name: Cao Cheng
page_title: Cao Cheng 曹乘 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Prince Shang of Gucheng [Cao] Cheng died early and was posthumously bestowed the title in the 5th year of Taihe. He had no descendants.

full_text:
Cao Cheng 曹乘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Cheng (曹乘). Prince, died without issue. Cao Cheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Prince Shang of Gucheng [Cao] Cheng died early and was posthumously bestowed the title in the 5th year of Taihe. He had no descendants.
